mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, c.title AS conversationTitle, m.role AS role, m.content AS content, MATCH(m.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AS relevanceScore, m.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN chat_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.user_id = #{userId} AND MATCH(m.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) ORDER BY relevanceScore DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN chat_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.user_id = #{userId} AND MATCH(m.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)

SELECT DATE(m.created_at) AS date, m.role AS role, COUNT(*) AS count FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN chat_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(m.created_at), m.role ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT HOUR(m.created_at) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN chat_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) GROUP BY HOUR(m.created_at) ORDER BY hour ASC

SELECT m.role AS role, COUNT(*) AS count FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN chat_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY m.role
